content.en:
Rumble!

The battle broke out!

Ye Tian's attack made these sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons stunned, and a mere fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon actually comprehended the sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules, what kind of joke is this!

These sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons have not comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and even the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have only scratched the surface.

The battle ended quickly.

It didn't take long for these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons to be killed by Ye Tian.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian slaughtered all the supreme void demons of this tribe.

Tens of thousands of Supreme Dao Void Demons fell into Ye Tian's hands like this, and then Ye Tian's replica body that did not participate in the battle left with these tens of thousands of Supreme Dao Void Demon corpses, while the other duplicated bodies only left one, and all the others were annihilated.

"Run!"

Ye Tian left quickly.

Every Supreme Dao Void Demon has a backer behind him, and if he slaughters a tribe, even if he uses his identity, he will definitely be investigated and hunted down.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Void Demon to copy his body and was intercepted by a very terrifying Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

And he committed suicide directly, leaving the sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon speechless.

However, Ye Tian's other Supreme Dao Void Demon Replica Body had already escaped far, far away, and no matter how much the other party used secret techniques to probe, he couldn't find it.

After that, he shuttled towards the Winter Night Fortress, and in a suitable position, he joined his True Replica Body, handed over the corpse of the Supreme Dao Void Demon to the True Replica Body, and brought it back to the Winter Night Fortress.

In this wave, Ye Tian directly earned 200,000 military exploits.

Moreover, he also swept away the resources of a tribe and made too much.

In the following years, Ye Tian used this method to hunt the Dao Void Demon.

Moreover, the copy body of the Supreme Dao Void Demon that he used was different every time, so for a while, the Supreme Dao Void Demon did not react.

But over time, it will definitely be exposed.

But when it really comes, he doesn't care anymore.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

During this period of time, Ye Tian did not hunt the Dao Void Demon, he had gathered enough high-quality Purple Ruins Devouring Stones, there was no need to earn any more battle merits.

One of his duplicate bodies patrolled occasionally, and the other replicated body had been in retreat and cultivating the Sixth Sequence of Supreme Dao Rules.

Now, his Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule was about to be raised to the Ten Percent Realm.

Seven out of nine!

Ninety-eight!

Nine out of nine!

100% complete!

"The sixth sequence of the Dao rules is ten percent of the consummation realm, and those eightfold supreme Dao realms are only the most demonic and powerful ones who can reach this realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

And his cultivation has recently been promoted to the late stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm.

In terms of strength, he was much stronger than when he first came to the Winter Night Fortress, and now his strength was already comparable to the top Eight Realms.

Of course, compared to those demonic eightfold supreme realms, he was still too far behind.

"Comprehending the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, there is no hope for the time being, I don't even know where there are items of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and the Winter Night Fortress does not even have a Supreme Dao Realm who has comprehended the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and I have never seen it. For now, it is more reliable to raise the cultivation to the peak of the fivefold Dao realm. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

"Heavenly Blood Myeld!"

"I didn't grab this thing!"

Ye Tian looked at the Heavenly Blood Mystery that had just been sold out, and said with some regret.

The Heavenly Blood Mystery Marrow is a resource that is revealed from the upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, which can greatly improve the cultivation of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and has the effect of improving the cultivation of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and its value is also very high.

Fifty thousand combat exploits and a drop of Heavenly Blood Xuan Essence, Heavenly Blood Xuan Qi is far from being comparable to the Heavenly Blood True Liquid.

Ye Tian wanted to quickly improve his cultivation, so he wanted to exchange the Heavenly Blood Xuanmu, but in such a long time, he had successfully exchanged it once, and then he was one step late every time.

He knew very well that it was easier for the high-level of the Winter Night Fortress to exchange for the Heavenly Blood Mystery Essence, and when these high-level Fortresses were exchanged, it would be their turn to be below, and then it would depend on luck, so many Supreme Dao Realm snatched and exchanged for the Heavenly Blood Essence, how good luck could it be to exchange for a drop!

"The position of the Patrol Envoy is still too low, it is one of the lowest positions in the Winter Night Fortress, you have to become the top level of the Winter Night Fortress, so that you can really exchange it for the Heavenly Blood Essence every time!"

Ye Tian studied it, and he felt that the commander of the Winter Night Fortress made this position the easiest to obtain, regardless of the background.

Moreover, the status of the commander is second only to the domain master, and he also has a lot of power, and can lead a team to fight.

Like Taisu Palace, he was not qualified to obtain a command position for him before, but he could use his current strength to seek a command position for himself.

First of all, he has obtained a lot of military merits in the position of patrol envoy, which is a qualification in itself, and the next step is to use his strength to apply for the position of commander envoy.

So, he applied to become a commander like a domain master.

......

"Ye Tian wants to apply to become a commander!"

Su Ya received this notice.

She knew that Ye Tian, the patrol envoy, had not been in the Winter Night Fortress for a long time, but the speed of obtaining combat merits was too fast, according to her understanding, Ye Tian was the supreme realm of the supreme path to the strongest path, and his talent was very demonic.

But in fact, in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the Supreme Dao Realm, which took the path of the strongest to the Dao, did not receive much attention from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

The reason why this is so is because the most powerful group of existences of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance did not follow the path of supreme strength and supreme path.

Under the limited resources, it costs less resources to cultivate the ordinary Supreme Dao Realm, and the Supreme Dao Realm that takes the path of the Supreme Dao is very demonic in itself, and if it takes the ordinary path, it may go further.

Therefore, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has not advocated cultivating the path of supreme strength and path, and this kind of genius will not give any preferential treatment, everything must rely on their own efforts.

However, in terms of obtaining resources, this type of genius does have more advantages, and they can often easily raise their cultivation to the peak of the sixfold Dao realm on their own, and they can also easily comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme realm.

However, the sixfold to the sevenfold to the sevenfold to the sevenfold to the realm has always been a bottleneck, and the sevenfold to the eightfold to the eightfold to the realm has been a bottleneck.

In the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, most of the demons who walked to the Extreme Dao Realm were permanently stuck at the peak level of the Sixfold Dao Realm, and they had been trapped at this level, and finally lost the mind to progress, and the Refining Purple Ruins Devouring Stone broke through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and they also stayed at this level forever and could not continue to break through.

However, only by relying on one's own efforts to become the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm could one truly gain the attention of the old guys of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

"Let him challenge the three commanders, and if all of them succeed, you can get a commander!"

Su Ya gave this order.

Not only Ye Tian, but if other Dao realms wanted to become commanders, it was also this process, and she didn't give Ye Tian any preferential treatment.
